---
id: create-receiver
title: "Create Receiver"
description: "Creates a new Receiver. Allows clients to create a single receiver record, which can later be referenced in payments or disbursements."
sidebar_label: "Create Receiver"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

---

>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/receivers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new Receiver. Allows clients to create a single receiver record, which can later be referenced in payments or disbursements.
